# ── DEPRECATED — do not use this file ────────────────────────────────────────
#
# This project uses pyproject.toml + uv for dependency management.
#
# To install dependencies:
#   uv sync              (installs all deps including dev)
#   uv sync --no-dev     (production deps only, same as Docker)
#
# To add a dependency:
#   uv add <package>
#
# Docker uses:
#   uv sync --frozen --no-dev
#
# This file exists only for legacy CI tools that require a requirements.txt.
# It is auto-generated from pyproject.toml and should not be edited manually.
#
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# To regenerate from pyproject.toml:
#   uv export --no-dev --output-file requirements.txt
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
